name: OWASP API Top 10:2023
description: OWASP API Security Top 10:2023 enumerates the most critical API security risks for secure development, testing, and governance.

categories.name: Risk Identification
categories.description: Identify and classify top API risks.

requirements.name: Broken Object Level Authorization
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for broken object level authorization.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API1:2023

requirements.name: Broken Authentication
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for broken authentication.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API2:2023

subcategories.name: Input and Logic
subcategories.description: Business logic and input handling risks.

requirements.name: Broken Object Property Level Authorization
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for broken object property level authorization.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API3:2023

requirements.name: Unrestricted Resource Consumption
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for unrestricted resource consumption.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API4:2023

requirements.name: Broken Function Level Authorization
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for broken function level authorization.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API5:2023

requirements.name: Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for unrestricted access to sensitive business flows.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API6:2023

subcategories.name: Integration and Supply Chain
subcategories.description: Third-party integration and supply chain controls.

requirements.name: Server Side Request Forgery
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for server side request forgery.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API7:2023

requirements.name: Security Misconfiguration
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for security misconfiguration.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API8:2023

requirements.name: Improper Inventory Management
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for improper inventory management.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API9:2023

requirements.name: Unsafe Consumption of APIs
requirements.description: Establish preventive, detective, and corrective controls for unsafe consumption of apis.
requirements.verification: Review controls, tests, and remediation evidence for API10:2023
